graphs.title: High-Level System Architecture
graphs.description: Four-component modular monolith: SPA, Django REST + WebSocket, AI pipeline, database.

graphs.title: Backend Layered Architecture
graphs.description: Feature-based modular monolith with service-repository pattern.

graphs.title: AI / Computer Vision Module
graphs.description: Internal structure of backend/ai/knowing_eye and adapter boundary.

graphs.title: Deployment Architecture
graphs.description: Production topology with TLS, ASGI workers, PostgreSQL, and Redis.

graphs.title: Frontend Component Architecture
graphs.description: React 18 feature-based SPA with providers, pages, and shared UI.

graphs.title: Exam Session Sequence Flow
graphs.description: End-to-end login through exam completion with parallel monitoring.

graphs.title: Real-Time Monitoring Data Flow
graphs.description: Frame capture through AI analysis, persistence, and alert broadcast.

graphs.title: REST API Surface Map
graphs.description: Complete REST endpoint catalog grouped by feature module.

graphs.title: Database Entity-Relationship Diagram
graphs.description: Relational schema across users, exams, sessions, behavior, and monitoring.
